originalTitle: 'They shot my neighbour in the head' - the lakeside city traumatised by war
title: 'They shot my neighbour in the head' - the lakeside city traumatised by war
content: Rebel fighters and Rwandan troops are accused of committing atrocities after capturing the DR Congo city of Uvira in December.

originalTitle: Ghana to evacuate 300 from South Africa over anti-immigrant protests
title: Ghana to evacuate 300 from South Africa over anti-immigrant protests
content: The foreign minister says the "distressed" Ghanaians registered with the embassy in Pretoria to be evacuated.

originalTitle: Dozens of dogs rescued and suspect arrested in Uganda after BBC investigation
title: Dozens of dogs rescued and suspect arrested in Uganda after BBC investigation
content: A BBC investigation exposed how scammers posted social content of dogs in distress to dupe donors into giving money.

originalTitle: Madonna, Shakira, BTS to headline World Cup final half-time show
title: Madonna, Shakira, BTS to headline World Cup final half-time show
content: Coldplay's Chris Martin will curate the show during the July 19 final at the MetLife Stadium in New Jersey, FIFA says.

originalTitle: Kyiv building collapses after Russian strike, reportedly trapping residents
title: Kyiv building collapses after Russian strike, reportedly trapping residents
content: Russia attacked the Ukrainian capital Kyiv with drones and missiles, damaging several buildings.

originalTitle: Trump, Xi speak ahead of talks to make relations ‘better than ever’
title: Trump, Xi speak ahead of talks to make relations ‘better than ever’
content: Presidents Xi Jinping and Donald Trump say they’re looking forward to US-China talks.

originalTitle: Trade, Iran and Taiwan on the agenda as Trump arrives in China for high-stakes talks with Xi
title: Trade, Iran and Taiwan on the agenda as Trump arrives in China for high-stakes talks with Xi
content: The US president says his first request to Xi would be to  "open up" China, while Beijing is expected to press Trump on the status of Taiwan.

originalTitle: Court overturns Alex Murdaugh's murder convictions and orders new trial
title: Court overturns Alex Murdaugh's murder convictions and orders new trial
content: The court has ordered a new trial over the June 2021 killings of Paul and Maggie Murdaugh.

originalTitle: Dozens of dogs rescued and suspect arrested in Uganda after BBC investigation
title: Dozens of dogs rescued and suspect arrested in Uganda after BBC investigation
content: A BBC investigation exposed how scammers posted social content of dogs in distress to dupe donors into giving money.

originalTitle: Hearts' McInnes rages at 'disgusting' Celtic penalty as title race goes to final day
title: Hearts' McInnes rages at 'disgusting' Celtic penalty as title race goes to final day
content: Hearts head coach Derek McInnes says his side are "up against everybody" after a "disgusting" 99th-minute penalty winner for Celtic ensured the Scottish Premiership title race goes to a final-day decider on Saturday.

originalTitle: Assist of the season? Mesmerising Foden keeps title hopes alive
title: Assist of the season? Mesmerising Foden keeps title hopes alive
content: Phil Foden's magical first-half assist proves the catalyst that Manchester City needed to maintain their challenge in this season's fascinating Premier League title race.

originalTitle: Penalty pandemonium sets up Hearts & Celtic showdown for the ages
title: Penalty pandemonium sets up Hearts & Celtic showdown for the ages
content: On a night of bewilderment, there was one unarguable truth. Hearts still have this in their own hands. Only Celtic can stop them, writes Tom English.
